steps.title: Compute the intercept
steps.content: Any nonzero base to the $0$ power is $1$, so $y=1$ and the $y$-intercept is $(0,1)$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice C, $(0,1)$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
